---
name: Parser failure
about: Report a broker statement parsing problem using redacted or synthetic data
title: "[Parser]: "
labels: parser
assignees: ""
---

## Broker And Format

- Broker: Schwab / IBKR / Fidelity / Robinhood / Other
- Format: PDF / CSV / HTML
- Statement period:

## Failure Mode

- [ ] Broker not detected
- [ ] Period not detected
- [ ] Account summary values wrong
- [ ] Holdings wrong
- [ ] Transactions wrong
- [ ] Other

## Redacted Example

Paste a small, manually redacted text snippet if possible. Do not attach full real statements.

## Privacy Reminder

Remove or replace:

- Account numbers
- Names and addresses
- Full holdings lists
- Exact balances
- Exact transaction history
